summary: P1 Dark Mode Verification PASSED for Mom user. Theme switching works correctly - Profile, Home, and Contraction Timer all show dark backgrounds (#1A1520) when Dark mode is selected. Doula/Midwife profiles don't have AppearanceSettings component (expected - only Mom profile was updated with theme selector).

issues: AppearanceSettings component is not included - providers cannot change their theme from their profile page. This is by design (only Mom profile was updated), but may need to be added for consistency.

test_results.mom_tab_bar_dark_mode: PASS - Tab bar uses dark surface colors
test_results.theme_context_useeffect: PASS - Console shows '[ThemeContext] useEffect triggered - effectiveTheme: DARK Platform.OS: web' and '[ThemeContext] Setting bg color: #1A1520'
test_results.data_theme_attribute: PASS - data-theme='dark' set on body element
test_results.doula_dashboard: N/A - Theme preference not persisted across sessions (expected), and Doula profile lacks AppearanceSettings

screens_verified: Mom Profile - Dark background applied, cards have dark surface
Mom Home - Dark background with 'Hello, Emma' greeting in light text
Contraction Timer - Dark background with timer circle visible
verification_details.theme_mechanism: ThemeContext CSS injection via style tag (#theme-override-styles) with !important rules successfully overrides react-native-web defaults

action_items: Optional: Add AppearanceSettings component to ProviderProfile.tsx if theme switching should be available to Doula/Midwife users
Note: data-testid attributes on TouchableOpacity elements are not rendered to DOM in React Native Web - mouse.click with coordinates is required for testing
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid props on React Native TouchableOpacity components don't render to DOM in react-native-web. For automated testing, coordinate-based clicks or alternative selectors are needed.
Mom home.tsx still has some hardcoded COLORS references in cards (actionCard backgroundColor: COLORS.white) - should use dynamic colors for full dark mode support

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 3 key Mom screens verified with dark backgrounds

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode is now working correctly for Mom user flows. The CSS injection in ThemeContext.tsx successfully overrides react-native-web defaults. Theme preference is stored in zustand store but not persisted to localStorage in the tested implementation. Doula/Midwife profiles don't have theme selector - only Mom profile has AppearanceSettings.
screenshots_captured: dm_03_profile_dark.png - Profile after dark mode enabled
dm_05_timer_dark.png - Contraction Timer in dark mode (verified)
